title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Fujitora, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13 as the Navy presence grows when Admiral Fujitora enters Dressrosa, while the tournament and Doflamingo’s schemes continue to tighten.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Moving on, it's time for B-block!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Enter, combatants !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: shall we be going now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That was quite a few notable names...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Now, how should we go about this...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Oh... here's your coat ...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: I'd like to bring over three battleships...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: For the time being, they should head to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ehh... where was it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah... "Green Bit"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes, there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And also... what was it.... right....

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: Marine ho admiral Tuiltoral (lado)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Request a large number of medical officers. We're going to have injuries...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'd like you to find out how many people are in the audience

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: as well as the population of this city... and of the whole country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ah... do we really need to know that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Rather than the number of enemies...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: shouldn't one instead count the number of those who need protecting...?

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Scene 2: Caesar Exchange Team

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Green bit, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: At a cafe' in the Northeast

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Can't really recommend it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The second

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You guys researchers? Or Explorers?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Unless it's something worth risking your lives for ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I say don't go ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But the bridge is sturdy enough, yes?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: for sure. It's an iron bridge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But, well, look at the entrance...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: As you can see, no one's using it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: All around green bit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There live swarms of "fighting fish"....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Seems like until they appeared, people came and went regularly

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Started about 200 years ago, I hear...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Shuroro Roro... Sir... just what are these "fighting fish"?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: violent fish with horns. If a ship approaches in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Well, they'll capsize it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: For that reason, the bridge was strength- lined with iron, but... it's still no use

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No use? ...O!!! You saying that even an iron bridge could be brought down by these fish!?

summary: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
